chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP NO.D-1683/2018 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For hearing of CMA No.7238/2018 2. For hearing of main case. 21.09.2021 Mr. Altamash Arab advocate Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG................ Learned counsel or petitioner seeks time. None present on behalf of SESSI/respondents No.2 and 3. Repeat notices. Needless to mention that this petition pertains to contribution of workers/employees. Learned counsel shall ensure to submit list of all workers/employees in terms whether they are registered with the SESSI or SESSI failed to provide them assistance with regard to registration. Besides, respondents shall submit report in terms that, whether petitioners are depositing the contributions with the SESSI. To come up on 04.10.2021 at 9.30 a.m. J U D G E J U D G E IK
